2605.23715.title: NLG Evaluation: Past, Present, Future
2605.23715.paper_summary: Natural Language Generation (NLG) evaluation has changed dramatically since 1990, and will continue to evolve in the future. In 1990, when NLG had close ties to linguistics, there was very little formal experimental evaluation in the modern sense. In 2026, when NLG is closely linked to machine learning, experimental evaluation is expected and indeed fundamental to research. Many evaluation techniques were developed over this period, including most recently LLM-as-Judge. I expect NLG evaluation will continue to evolve in the future. In particular, impact, qualitative, and safety evaluation will become more important as large numbers of people routinely use NLG technology.
2605.23715.paper_summary_zh: 自然語言生成（NLG）的評估自1990年以來發生了劇變，並將在未來持續演變。<lb/>在1990年，當NLG與語言學有著密切的聯繫時，幾乎沒有現代意義上的正式實驗評估。<lb/>到了2026年，當NLG與機器學習緊密相連時，實驗評估被期望且確實成為研究的基礎。<lb/>在這段期間，開發了許多評估技術，包括最近的LLM-as-Judge。<lb/>我預期NLG評估將在未來繼續演變。<lb/>特別是，影響、質量和安全評估將變得更加重要，因為大量人群會常規使用NLG技術。
2605.23715.author: Ehud Reiter et.al.
